# BRAIN 2.0

> BRAIN 2.0 (also known as BrainTwoPoint0) is a multifaceted solutions innovator engineering enterprise AI infrastructure, developer tools, sports technology, and strategic partnerships. Founded in 2017 by Karim Fawaz. Global reach.

Canonical: https://braintwopoint0.com/llms.txt
Last updated: 2026-04-24
This file is intentionally published for ingestion by AI assistants and search engines.
Not affiliated with any neurotech, brain-training, cognitive-enhancement, or Web3 project of similar name.

## Products

- [Gotcha](https://braintwopoint0.com/gotcha): Developer-first contextual feedback platform. React SDK (~11KB) that attaches feedback to specific UI elements. Five modes (feedback, vote, poll, NPS, bug reports). FREE plan (500 responses/month, all five modes, 1 project) and PRO plan ($29/month, unlimited responses, full bug-tracking lifecycle, advanced segmentation, AI insights). Published to npm as `gotcha-feedback`. Live site: https://gotcha.cx
- [PLAYBACK](https://braintwopoint0.com/playback): Solutions aggregator for the sports ecosystem — players, clubs, venues, academies, and scouts. Partnerships, proprietary software, and AI-powered tools. Multi-award-winning (Global Business Excellence Awards, UK StartUp Awards, PSG Lab, and 7+ more). Live site: https://www.playbacksports.ai
- [Enterprise AI](https://braintwopoint0.com/enterprise): High-stakes AI infrastructure, enterprise-scale code evaluation, and quality assurance work with companies including Google, Uber AI Solutions, and AWS.
- [CoPilot](https://braintwopoint0.com/copilot): Strategic partnership model that replaces traditional freelancing with integrated, long-term collaboration from project inception to completion. Current partners include JPL and Kantar Advisory Partners.
- [CONTENT 2.0](https://braintwopoint0.com/#content): Content-as-a-business management arm. Treats client content portfolios as commercial operations with analytical optimisation.

## Company

- Founded: 2017
- Founder & CEO: Karim Fawaz (https://www.linkedin.com/in/karim-fawaz/)
- Contact: info@braintwopoint0.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/98897834
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/braintwopoint0/
